string 2:
This is an extradimensional space created by
a certain Digimon. It's called an "Akashic Backdoor."

Several space-time disturbances have been used to connect
this Akashic Backdoor to various points in space-time.

Your mission is to defeat the Digimon responsible for 
creating and maintaining this Akashic Backdoor.

Meanwhile, I'll be using your device to provide you with
updates as necessary. I look forward to working with you.
First of all, you need to investigate this area.

This is another Akashic Backdoor. Basically, that same Digimon
has once again warped the natural laws of the world.
You'll have to defeat them, just like you did before.
First, you'll need to investigate this area.
Fade into the dust of space-time!

I'm the biggest, baddest, toughest Digimon around!
You think a bluff like that is gonna make ME back off?!
Absorbent Bang!
Flashy Boss Punch!

That was Parallelmon, the Digimon behind all this. 
Thanks to some mutation, they're able to travel through space-time.

It seems they've built up Akashic Backdoors like a web, and
uses them to slip from one point in space-time to another.

They can travel to the past or the future. 
But them doing so repeatedly is destabilizing the world.

To stop the laws of reality from collapsing, we must destroy
Parallelmon and the Akashic Backdoors. I'm counting on you.

As I feared, it seems Parallelmon has created
another Akashic Backdoor...

It has to be destroyed, just like before.
I'm counting on you.
Are you finally awake?
It wasn't easy, dragging you all the way over here.

I'm BanchoLeomon.
Who are you?

So, you were thrown into this world
because of Parallelmon too, huh?
How about we work together so we can both go home?

Of course, I understand not wanting to work with someone
you barely know. So, let's get to know each other...

...with the best possible form of communication—our fists!
What do you say to a one-on-one, best-of-three match?

"Hello, folks. This is OcculTokyo TV.
Am I... dreaming right now?"

"I'm in hot pursuit of the Digimon known as 'Parallelmon.'
I got hit by their beam of light and somehow ended up here."

"Where exactly am I, and what kind of place is this...? 
Be sure to subscribe to my channel if you wanna find out!"
I'm— AAAAAAAAAAAAAGH!

A-A human?!
D-Don't scare me like that!
Wait! I know you...!

{player}?!
I-It can't be...!

Where have you been?! 
I thought for sure you were dead!

...Oh, now I get it. 
I've crossed over into the afterlife, haven't I...?
Um, no offense, but your story just doesn't add up...

I mean, right now, the major cities are barely functioning,
and the countdown to the apocalypse has already begun.

Most people have given up and are just waiting to meet
their doom. What have you been doing all this time?!

From what I can tell, she comes from a
different time and space than you do.

This kind of thing often happens when
an Akashic Backdoor is left unchecked.

Space-time distortions continue to multiply until
the world is no longer able to maintain its proper form.

I understand your confusion. It all stems from
Parallelmon's beam of light—the "Absorbent Bang."

It's apparently able to bend the very fabric of both time and space.
I was also caught up in that beam and sent here.

What do you say we all team up and
take down Parallelmon together?
Yeah, I suppose there's no point to us just standing around...

...and, more importantly, there are people waiting
to see my videos! I need to get back to my world.

Even if this is the afterlife, I plan on being the
first person in history to capture it on film.

And I plan on beating Parallelmon senseless. 
We'll need more help in order to do that, however.

If I can wake up a certain warrior, 
I'm sure he'll agree to lend us his fists as well.

He's probably also been sent here from another world—
the nameless white warrior...

It happened just after I arrived here. I was attacked by
Parallelmon before I even knew what was going on.

The white warrior saved me. I'm not sure if he used up
all of his strength, but he then fell into a deep slumber.

I owe him... and it's important to always repay one's debts.
I swear on my title of "Bancho" to return the favor!

You're quite the character. 
I can see my viewership numbers going through the roof!

We should totally do a collab for OcculTokyo TV! 
We'll call it "Journeys with a Bancho: Underworld Edition"!
What's a "collab"?

It's when two warriors bump fists and swear to fight together!
The viewers will love your life... er... fighting style!

Very well, fist bump accepted. Let us "collab." 
Just make sure your camera captures my jacket flowing in the wind.
Also, there's a friend who was sent to this world alongside me.

The two of us split up to try to find a way to awaken the
warrior in white, but my friend hasn't come back yet.

I'm afraid she was attacked by Parallelmon. 
Come with me. I'm going to go find out what happened.
